title: librarian: add executable doctest for load_config and fix path references 📚
summary: Added a concrete, executable doctest for `tokmd::config::load_config` demonstrating `ConfigContext` usage, and fixed broken path references (`tokmd::resolve_config` -> `tokmd::config::resolve_config`) in existing doctests to prevent silent drift.
proof_summary: Doctests run successfully via `cargo test --doc -p tokmd`.
